heading: Public disclosure of certain information on hospital financial interest and referral patterns
label: 1320b–16 Public disclosure of certain information on hospital financial interest and referral patterns
text: The Secretary shall make available to the public, in a form and manner specified by the Secretary, information disclosed to the Secretary pursuant to .section 1395cc(a)(1)(S) of this title
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–33, title IV, § 4321(d)(2)111 Stat. 395Aug. 5, 1997“The Secretary of Health and Human Services shall issue regulations by not later than the date which is 1 year after the date of the enactment of this Act [] to carry out the amendments made by subsections (b) and (c) [enacting this section and amending ] and such amendments shall take effect as of such date (on or after the issuance of such regulations) as the Secretary specifies in such regulations.”Aug. 5, 1997section 1395cc of this title
